title: super cool evil mod pack
description: a simple bewitchment modpack for a friend group server. icon is tina the cat (evil)
body:
a simple bewitchment modpack for a friend group server. icon is tina the cat (evil)

designed for optimization (based on fabulously optimized), focus on the bewitchment mod, with origins for player specializations. various quality of life and minor beautification mods are also included
